evals.prompt: Can you validate my avalara-tax app before I submit? It's backend-only with tax calculation hooks. The ZIP is at tax/avalara/avalara-tax-v0.2.8.zip
evals.expected_output: Should detect Backend-only architecture, validate commerce-app.json, impex files (services.xml install/uninstall), hooks.json, skip storefront validation, verify SHA256 matches manifest, check tasksList.json exists

assertions.name: detects backend-only architecture
assertions.description: Should identify cartridges/ present, no storefront-next/

assertions.name: validates ZIP structure
assertions.description: Single root folder, no junk files, no domain prefixes

assertions.name: computes and verifies SHA256
assertions.description: Hash computation and manifest comparison

assertions.name: validates commerce-app.json fields
assertions.description: Required fields present: id, name, description, domain, version, publisher

assertions.name: checks tasksList.json exists
assertions.description: Required merchant post-installation task list

assertions.name: validates impex services.xml
assertions.description: Well-formed XML, valid service config, no hardcoded credentials

assertions.name: validates install/uninstall pair match
assertions.description: Service IDs in install and uninstall must match exactly

assertions.name: skips storefront validation
assertions.description: Should not check for target-config.json or TypeScript files

assertions.name: checks hooks.json uses explicit script paths
assertions.description: Hook paths must be explicit, not relative

assertions.name: verifies package.json has hooks field
assertions.description: Cartridge package.json must include 'hooks' field

evals.prompt: Validate my product reviews widget app before submitting. It's UI-only with no backend. ZIP is at ratings-and-reviews/reviewhub/reviewhub-reviews-v1.0.0.zip
evals.expected_output: Should detect UI-only architecture, validate storefront-next structure, check for target-config.json, verify all three locales, check Apache 2.0 headers, verify 'use client' directives, skip impex validation, check tasksList.json

assertions.name: detects UI-only architecture
assertions.description: Should identify storefront-next/ present, no cartridges/

assertions.name: validates target-config.json exists
assertions.description: Extension config file at storefront-next/src/extensions/<appName>/

assertions.name: checks target-config.json structure
assertions.description: Must have components array with targetId, path, order

assertions.name: validates index.ts barrel file
assertions.description: Must exist at storefront-next/src/extensions/<appName>/index.ts

assertions.name: checks all three required locales
assertions.description: en-US, en-GB, it-IT translations.json files must exist

assertions.name: validates locales have identical structure
assertions.description: All locale files should have same keys

assertions.name: checks for Apache 2.0 copyright headers
assertions.description: All .ts/.tsx files must start with license header

assertions.name: verifies 'use client' directives
assertions.description: Components must have 'use client' after copyright, before imports

assertions.name: checks no hardcoded strings
assertions.description: Should verify useTranslation() usage, no English hardcoded

assertions.name: skips impex validation
assertions.description: Should not check for services.xml or impex directory

assertions.name: skips cartridge validation
assertions.description: Should not look for hooks.json or package.json

assertions.name: checks tasksList.json exists
assertions.description: Required merchant post-installation task list

evals.prompt: I need to validate my loyalty program app before PR. It's fullstack - has both UI components and backend hooks. ZIP at loyalty/loyaltymax/loyaltymax-points-v1.0.0.zip
evals.expected_output: Should detect Fullstack architecture, validate both storefront-next files AND impex files, check target-config.json, locales, copyright headers, 'use client' directives, hooks.json, services.xml, install/uninstall pairs, tasksList.json

assertions.name: detects fullstack architecture
assertions.description: Should identify both storefront-next/ and cartridges/ present

assertions.name: validates storefront structure
assertions.description: target-config.json, index.ts, components exist

assertions.name: checks all three locales
assertions.description: en-US, en-GB, it-IT must be present

assertions.name: validates copyright headers and use client
assertions.description: Apache 2.0 headers and 'use client' directives

assertions.name: validates backend cartridges
assertions.description: Cartridge structure, package.json with hooks field

assertions.name: validates hooks.json configuration
assertions.description: Explicit script paths, domain-appropriate hooks

assertions.name: validates impex files
assertions.description: Well-formed services.xml in install/ and uninstall/

assertions.name: checks install/uninstall match
assertions.description: Service IDs must match between install and uninstall

assertions.name: validates commerce-app.json
assertions.description: All required fields for fullstack app

assertions.name: checks tasksList.json exists
assertions.description: Required merchant post-installation task list with both UI and backend tasks

assertions.name: verifies SHA256 hash
assertions.description: Computed hash matches manifest entry

evals.prompt: My PR failed CI checks for the shipping app. Can you help me figure out what's wrong? The app is at shipping/fedex/fedex-shipping-v2.0.0.zip
evals.expected_output: Should run validate-app to identify specific issues, report line numbers and file paths for errors, provide fix recommendations

assertions.name: runs comprehensive validation
assertions.description: Should check ZIP structure, manifest, impex, architecture

assertions.name: reports specific errors with file paths
assertions.description: Errors should include file names and line numbers

assertions.name: provides fix recommendations
assertions.description: Should suggest how to fix each identified issue

assertions.name: checks common failure points
assertions.description: SHA256 mismatch, XML syntax, missing files, junk files

evals.prompt: Check if my app package is ready to submit for PR
evals.expected_output: Should trigger validate-app proactively, detect architecture, run full validation checklist, provide clear PASS/FAIL status

assertions.name: triggers validate-app skill
assertions.description: Should use validate-app skill for comprehensive check

assertions.name: asks for app details if not provided
assertions.description: Domain, app name, version to locate ZIP

assertions.name: detects architecture type
assertions.description: UI-only, Backend-only, or Fullstack

assertions.name: runs architecture-specific validation
assertions.description: Only checks relevant files based on architecture

assertions.name: provides clear pass/fail status
assertions.description: Final summary: ✅ PASS or ❌ FAIL with issue list
